title: Racosperma resinimargineum
taxonomy: Racosperma resinimargineum is a species of tree that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is a member of the genus Racosperma, which is a group of plants native to Australia. The species Racosperma resinimargineum is also known as Acacia resinimargineum, and it is a part of the larger Acacia genus that includes many other species of trees and shrubs. The classification of Racosperma resinimargineum is often debated among botanists, but it is widely accepted as a member of the Fabaceae family. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and relationships of this species.
